prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: I recently had the opportunity to try "Waking Up" and I must say it was a thoroughly unremarkable experience. The packaging, if you will, was a bit rough - the abrupt cessation of sleep was jarring and left me feeling disoriented. The product itself, being conscious and alert, was nothing special - the usual assortment of aches and pains, a dry mouth, and a vague sense of dread about the day ahead. The instructions, which seemed to be "just get out of bed and start doing things," were unclear and lacking in detail. Overall, I would give Waking Up 2.5 stars out of 5 - it's a necessary part of life, I suppose, but it's not something I would recommend seeking out for its own sake. Would not wake up again if I didn't have to.
